summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Installation-Based Filtering feature. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - User Management page shows Installations column with badges, Dashboard displays filtered data (60 observations, 2 actions, 56 equipment for Tyromer installation).

minor.issue: Does not include assigned_installations field (available via /api/rbac/users instead)

critical_code_review_comments: InstallationFilterService properly implements cascading filter: installations -> equipment IDs -> threats -> actions
Empty assigned_installations array correctly returns 0 data (no access)
RBAC service _serialize_user includes assigned_installations field at line 315
User Management page correctly shows Installations column with Factory icon badges
Equipment hierarchy /api/equipment-hierarchy/nodes properly filters by installation
Stats endpoint /api/stats properly filters counts by installation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Installation-based filtering fully implemented and tested. Key behavior: Users with empty assigned_installations see NO data (zeros). Users with Tyromer assigned see 60 threats, 56 equipment nodes, 2 actions. The filtering cascades through: installations -> equipment IDs -> threats -> actions. User Management page shows Installations column with badges.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/stats: PASSED - Returns filtered counts (60 threats, 4 critical, 5 high)
backend_api_tests.GET /api/threats: PASSED - Returns 60 threats filtered by Tyromer installation
backend_api_tests.GET /api/threats/top: PASSED - Returns top threats filtered by installation
backend_api_tests.GET /api/actions: PASSED - Returns 2 actions filtered by installation
backend_api_tests.GET /api/rbac/users: PASSED - Includes assigned_installations field for each user
backend_api_tests.Stats and threats count consistency: PASSED - Stats total matches actual threats count
backend_api_tests.Equipment stats and nodes consistency: PASSED - Stats total_nodes matches actual count

frontend_ui_tests.User Management Installations column: PASSED - Column header visible in table
frontend_ui_tests.Installation badges displayed: PASSED - Tyromer badge shown for test user and Jaap
frontend_ui_tests.Observations page shows filtered threats: PASSED - All observations related to Tyromer equipment

user_with_no_installations.expected_behavior: Returns 0 for all counts (no data access)
